dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses EMA_20 as adaptive threshold instead of fixed level. Alexander reversal filter approximated as 1% return threshold (0.01 in decimal scale). CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction generates both long and short entry/exit conditions. Regime restricted to TRENDING variants per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses EMA_20 as adaptive threshold instead of fixed level. Alexander reversal filter approximated as 1% return threshold (0.01 in decimal scale). CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction generates both long and short entry/exit conditions. Regime restricted to TRENDING variants per signal specification.

source_rule_text: Use variable thresholds instead of fixed thresholds when trading trending time series, because fixed thresholds become impractical when the underlying asset exhibits large long-lasting level changes.
